ai.desc: Starts with #wDevotion -> #wReach #wHeaven. Afterwards, cycles #wWallop -> #wWave #wof #wthe #wHand / #wProtect until entering Divinity. Upon entering Divinity, if #wReach #wHeaven was used since last entering Divinity, uses #wThrough #wViolence. Otherwise, uses #wReach #wHeven. Then cycles #wWallop -> #wWave #wof #wthe #wHand / #wProtect again.
ai.notes: #wDevotion gives Mantra every turn. Once 10 Mantra are obtained, enters Divinity for the turn, dealing triple damage with attacks. #wWallop gives Block equal to the amount of unblocked damage dealt. #wWave #wof #wthe #wHand applies Weak to you whenever Watcher gains Block that turn.
